word: H6998 - קָטַף - qâṭaph - kaw-taf' - Crop off

sections.paragraph:
Original: קטף

Transliteration: qâṭaph

Phonetic: kaw-taf'

BDB Definition:

  1. to pluck off or out, cut off
    1. (Qal) to pluck off
    2. (Niphal) to be plucked off

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2010

Part(s) of speech: Verb
